channel.title: Posts on Kleinhaus
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Kleinhaus

item.title: Good Morning ...
item.description: Hello there; thank you for stopping by. In this post, I intend to answer the question, “What is this, and why does it exist?” I’m setting up this blog as a space for me to “learn in public”. I intend for it to serve as a quasi-journal into which I distill the different things that I’ll be learning, working on, and thinkig about. I expect the focus of the posts to be on two main areas: Programming and product.
